title: diastema erinoides
intro: Diastema erinoides, also known as the Tooth Ache Plant, is a medicinal plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties to treat toothaches, fever, and other ailments. The medicinal properties of Diastema erinoides include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, making it a valuable remedy for oral health issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of toothaches and other health issues.
